comment.body: Strictly voodoo but what I watch to make plays.  Red mean was target and  is our dominant regression from 8/29.  -1 SD held yesterday into close so target was up around the mean ..  Spx 52 (alama weekly) key in my study, and 48 (purple).  Both reject so far would look for gap close if we continue rejection or a run for mean again if we overtake w a candle close over 52.
